title: Subscription Fallthru Inconsistency
body: [Per this discussion](https://github.com/dapr/dapr/pull/8692#discussion_r2099378669), we should update the `Deliver` & `DeliverBulk` funcs to fallthru consistently. As of now, one falls thru to retry and the other to success which is inconsistent.

comments.body:
I would like to tackle this. It would be my first contribution to dapr. I'm not sure what the best approach is for submitting my change b/c the `Deliver` & `DeliverBulk` funcs do not exist in the dapr/dapr repo, but in the JoshVanL fork (new funcs created as part of the refactor). Should I create a PR targeting JoshVanL's fork, make the changes in the new funcs, and allow Josh to merge my changes into the fork? 

Your counsel would be greatly appreciated! I look forward to contributing

Hi @rtunn,
gentle ping. are you working on this issue. I would like to take it up if not. 

The code is merged to master, so now you can make changes to `Deliver` and `DeliverBulk`.

I see this is about inconsistent fallthru behavior in Deliver vs DeliverBulk funcs - one falls thru to retry, the other to success. I'd like to fix this consistency issue. The PR discussion mentions the specific changes needed. Is this still available?
